description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that includes the standard Node.js templates for base setup, linting, test coverage, and GitLab Pages deployment. Define two custom jobs in the test stage: an integration job that runs npm run test:integration, uses a mongo service, sets MONGODB_URI to mongodb://mongo/koa-session-mongoose, and is excluded from tag pipelines; and a unit job that runs npm run test:unit, also excluded from tag pipelines. Both jobs inherit the Node Docker image and caching defined in the included templates. The pipeline also contains the lint, coverage, and pages jobs supplied by the included templates, with the pages job publishing the built site as an artifact. Use only/except rules as specified for the custom jobs.
